CustomObject.description: Per-dependency circuit-breaker thresholds. Maps a dependency key (an external system/integration name shared across workflows) to the failure count, rolling window, open duration, and half-open probe budget that govern its breaker, using the same DeveloperName convention as Concurrency_Config__mdt (including a Default fallback record). A dependency key with no matching record (and no Default) has no breaker.
CustomObject.label: Circuit Breaker Config
